allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('app ok'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; [print\(r.path, r.methods\) for r in app.routes]")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from langgraph.checkpoint.sqlite.aio import AsyncSqliteSaver; print\('AsyncSqliteSaver available'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import inspect; from langgraph.checkpoint.sqlite.aio import AsyncSqliteSaver; print\(inspect.signature\(AsyncSqliteSaver.from_conn_string\)\); print\('---'\); print\(inspect.getsource\(AsyncSqliteSaver.from_conn_string\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/workflows/graph.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('graph.py syntax OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/api/graph_controller.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('app/api/streaming_graph_controller.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('app/services/mcp_server.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('tests/test_p0_fixes.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('All files syntax OK'\)")
